brief_justification: Correctly selects (D) with valid causal mechanism about the sorting signal disappearing; goes one level deep explaining the routing mechanism and acknowledges residual skill-transfer effect, but doesn't trace second-order effects like accident redistribution across route types; no explicit reflection on reasoning process or named biases; no counterfactual checks or boundary tests applied; acknowledges uncertainty by noting some genuine skill transfer may remain, but no structured confidence analysis; does not evaluate or rule out options A, B, or C; the causal chain is followable (dominant confound → mandatory certification → indistinguishable drivers → routing advantage lost → <40% reduction) but some intermediate steps are compressed
